$comment: Design token file for the Menu Item component
$description: A single row in a mobile context menu. 187px wide. Composed of an optional leading icon (20px), a content column (label + optional subtext), a flexible spacer, and an optional trailing chevron-right icon (24px). Two types: Default (dark gray text) and Destructive (red text and icon — used for irreversible actions such as Delete). An optional 1px divider renders below the row to separate it from the next item.

width.description: Fixed width of the menu item row — matches the menu container width

background.description: White background for every row regardless of type

padding.description: 8px inset on all sides of the row

gap.description: 8px horizontal gap between the leading icon and the content column

size.description: Width and height of the optional leading semantic icon

height.description: Fixed height of the label container row

gap.description: Gap between inline elements within the label row (e.g. label text and a badge)

typography.description: 13px Regular, 18px line-height — optional secondary description below the label

width.description: Fixed width applied to the subtext paragraph to constrain its layout within the row

size.description: Width and height of the trailing chevron icon

name.description: GHL icon name for the trailing navigation indicator

height.description: Height of the separator line rendered below the row when divider=true

color.description: #eaecf0 — subtle gray separator between menu rows

label-color.description: #101828 — near-black label text for standard (non-destructive) actions

subtext-color.description: #101828 — same as label color; subtext uses same hue at lighter weight

icon-color.description: #101828 — leading and trailing icons match label color in Default type

label-color.description: #d92d20 — red label text signalling an irreversible/destructive action

subtext-color.description: #d92d20 — red subtext matching the label to reinforce the destructive signal

icon-color.description: #d92d20 — leading icon rendered in red for Destructive type
